title: GoopReforged
description: Goop is a library. It provides an easy way to implement slime and splash visual effects.
body:
# GoopReforged  
This mod is the Forge port of [Goop](https://modrinth.com/mod/goop). Please do not report any crash logs related to this mod on the original mod's page. Instead, you can submit issues on our [issue page](https://github.com/MCTeamPotato/Goop-Reforged/issues).  

## Introduction  
Originally released as part of [ULTRACRAFT](https://modrinth.com/mod/absolute-ultracraft), Goop is now a standalone library. It provides an easy way to implement slime and splash visual effects. Since its debut in ULTRACRAFT, numerous significant improvements have been made. The mod also offers many configurable options.  

## For Developers  
Refer to the [README](https://github.com/MCTeamPotato/Goop-Reforged/blob/1.20.1forge/README.md) file on GitHub for more details.  

## License  
This mod is open source under the MIT license, just like the original mod.
